acceptance_mapping.01-clean-install: Clean installation log (git clone + uv sync).
acceptance_mapping.02-install: Install log (Digital State installed in clone).
acceptance_mapping.03-bootstrap: Bootstrap log (Digital State + Hermes Orchestrator initialized).
acceptance_mapping.04-runtime-startup: Runtime startup log (runtime.py launched, no chat).
acceptance_mapping.05-speckit: SpecKit evidence (spec/plan/tasks generated from repo templates).
acceptance_mapping.06-builder-retrieval: Builder card retrieval via Hermes Kanban Orchestrator.
acceptance_mapping.07-auditor-retrieval: Auditor card retrieval via Hermes Kanban Orchestrator.
